name: Irene Shah

current_profile.summary: CIO at a mid-size insurance company. Extensive experience with cloud migration, cybersecurity, and IT governance. Has sponsored ML pilots but wants deeper AI literacy to guide enterprise strategy and governance.
current_profile.ai_experience: Has sponsored ML pilots, wants deeper AI literacy

learning_intent: Wants to operate like a 'Chief AI Officer' in practice: set AI strategy, governance, and capability building across the enterprise.

target_jd.title: Enterprise AI Leader (Strategy + Governance)
requirements: Define and execute enterprise AI strategy aligned to business priorities
Implement responsible AI governance, risk management, and compliance controls
Stand up evaluation, monitoring, and model risk management practices
Build AI talent strategy and operating model (CoE vs embedded)

expected_skill_gaps.description: AI risk framing, policy-to-controls mapping, and retention/minimization practices.
Monitoring, drift, logging, evaluation strategies, and release gates for AI systems.
Threat landscape, injection/data leakage risks, and secure deployment practices (oversight level).
Keeping up with AI developments and evaluating new tools/vendors.
AI enablement strategy and talent development.
